### `BrokerToken`

### `BrokerTokenMinter`

`interface` — The one method the provider needs — `TangleAppsClient` satisfies it structurally, so `createBrokerTokenProvider({ client: tangleAppsClient, … })` type-checks without importing the concrete class.
